name: orchard-viper-conductor-repo
description: Playbook for the @MRIIOT/orchard-viper-conductor meta-agent. Routes Viper questions to @MRIIOT/orchard-viper (canonical) or @MRIIOT/orchard-viper-forum (community) and synthesizes the answer.
_comment: Intentionally minimal — the conductor has no local subprocesses. All work happens via MCP tools (route_to_peer, probe_peers) inside Claude Code. package.json exists only to mark the repo shape and let dev tooling treat the folder as a node project.
